failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG DES exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Particulate matter or crystallization in the DES
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter before BPR and ensure DES is fully dissolved

failure_modes.cause: Increased viscosity or partial blockage in reactor tubing
failure_modes.mitigation: Regularly monitor pressure and clean reactor tubing

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=7.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve with particulate-laden solvent to assess blockage risk
Measure pressure drop across reactor at various flow rates to ensure consistency
